examples.en: The concept of freedom means different things to different people.
examples.zh: 自由的概念對不同的人有不同的意義。

examples.en: She explained the basic concept behind the new design.
examples.zh: 她解釋了新設計背後的基本概念。

examples.en: Honesty is an important principle in her life.
examples.zh: 誠實是她人生中重要的原則。

examples.en: He refused to lie because of his principles.
examples.zh: 他因為自己的原則而拒絕說謊。

examples.en: A positive attitude helps you overcome difficulties.
examples.zh: 正面的態度能幫助你克服困難。

examples.en: His bad attitude annoyed his coworkers.
examples.zh: 他惡劣的態度惹惱了同事。

examples.en: There is a possibility that it will rain tonight.
examples.zh: 今晚有可能會下雨。

examples.en: We should consider every possibility before deciding.
examples.zh: 在決定之前我們應該考慮每一種可能性。

img: fork in the road with two paths

examples.en: Her teacher had a great influence on her career.
examples.zh: 她的老師對她的職業生涯有很大的影響。

examples.en: Advertising has a strong influence on children.
examples.zh: 廣告對孩童有很強的影響。

examples.en: The purpose of this meeting is to plan the trip.
examples.zh: 這次會議的目的是規劃旅行。

examples.en: She lives her life with a clear purpose.
examples.zh: 她帶著明確的目的過生活。

examples.en: Tell me the reason why you were late.
examples.zh: 告訴我你遲到的原因。

examples.en: There is no reason to be afraid.
examples.zh: 沒有理由害怕。

examples.en: The result of the test surprised everyone.
examples.zh: 測驗的結果讓大家很驚訝。

examples.en: His hard work led to a great result.
examples.zh: 他的努力帶來了很好的結果。

img: finish line ribbon at race end

examples.en: The medicine had an immediate effect.
examples.zh: 這藥立即產生了效果。

examples.en: Pollution has a bad effect on our health.
examples.zh: 污染對我們的健康有不良影響。

img: domino chain falling in a row

examples.en: The police are looking for the cause of the fire.
examples.zh: 警方正在尋找火災的起因。

examples.en: Stress can be a cause of headaches.
examples.zh: 壓力可能是頭痛的原因。

examples.en: Education has great value for your future.
examples.zh: 教育對你的未來有很大的價值。

examples.en: Family values are important in her culture.
examples.zh: 家庭價值觀在她的文化中很重要。

examples.en: Her belief in herself never faded.
examples.zh: 她對自己的信念從未消退。

examples.en: People have different beliefs about life.
examples.zh: 人們對人生有不同的信念。

img: hand on heart with closed eyes

examples.en: In my opinion, this movie is boring.
examples.zh: 在我看來,這部電影很無聊。

examples.en: Everyone has a right to their own opinion.
examples.zh: 每個人都有權表達自己的意見。

examples.en: My goal is to speak English fluently.
examples.zh: 我的目標是流利地說英語。

examples.en: They reached their goal after years of work.
examples.zh: 經過多年努力,他們達成了目標。

examples.en: This shop is known for its high quality.
examples.zh: 這家店以高品質聞名。

examples.en: Patience is a good quality in a teacher.
examples.zh: 耐心是老師的好特質。

examples.en: She has the ability to solve hard problems.
examples.zh: 她有能力解決困難的問題。

examples.en: Practice can improve your ability.
examples.zh: 練習能提升你的能力。

examples.en: Freedom of speech is a basic right.
examples.zh: 言論自由是基本權利。

examples.en: Birds enjoy the freedom of the sky.
examples.zh: 鳥兒享受天空的自由。

img: bird flying out of open cage

examples.en: The court fights for justice.
examples.zh: 法院為正義而奮鬥。

examples.en: People want justice for the victims.
examples.zh: 人們希望為受害者伸張正義。

examples.en: You must always tell the truth.
examples.zh: 你必須永遠說實話。

examples.en: The truth finally came out.
examples.zh: 真相終於水落石出。

examples.en: With age comes wisdom.
examples.zh: 隨著年紀增長而有智慧。

examples.en: His wisdom guided the young team.
examples.zh: 他的智慧引導著這支年輕的團隊。

examples.en: It takes courage to admit a mistake.
examples.zh: 承認錯誤需要勇氣。

examples.en: She showed great courage during the crisis.
examples.zh: 危機中她展現了極大的勇氣。

examples.en: Learning a language requires patience.
examples.zh: 學習語言需要耐心。

examples.en: He waited with great patience.
examples.zh: 他非常有耐心地等待。

examples.en: It is your responsibility to feed the dog.
examples.zh: 餵狗是你的責任。

examples.en: She took responsibility for the mistake.
examples.zh: 她為這個錯誤負起責任。

examples.en: Speaking two languages is a big advantage.
examples.zh: 會說兩種語言是很大的優勢。

examples.en: Being tall gives him an advantage in basketball.
examples.zh: 身高讓他在籃球上占有優勢。

examples.en: Exercise has many health benefits.
examples.zh: 運動對健康有很多益處。

examples.en: The new policy will benefit workers.
examples.zh: 新政策將使勞工受益。

img: plus sign with green upward arrow

examples.en: Climbing the mountain was a real challenge.
examples.zh: 爬那座山是個真正的挑戰。

examples.en: She enjoys facing new challenges.
examples.zh: 她喜歡面對新的挑戰。

examples.en: We found a simple solution to the problem.
examples.zh: 我們找到了解決問題的簡單方法。

examples.en: There is no easy solution to this issue.
examples.zh: 這個問題沒有簡單的解決方法。

examples.en: This is the best method to learn quickly.
examples.zh: 這是快速學習的最佳方法。

examples.en: She uses a new teaching method.
examples.zh: 她使用一種新的教學方法。

examples.en: Learning is a slow process.
examples.zh: 學習是個緩慢的過程。

examples.en: The baking process takes two hours.
examples.zh: 烘焙過程需要兩個小時。

examples.en: The situation got worse after the storm.
examples.zh: 暴風雨後情況變得更糟。

examples.en: He handled the difficult situation calmly.
examples.zh: 他冷靜地處理了那個困難的情況。

examples.en: The car is in good condition.
examples.zh: 這輛車狀況良好。

examples.en: You can borrow it on one condition.
examples.zh: 你可以借它,但有一個條件。

examples.en: The news had a big impact on the market.
examples.zh: 這則新聞對市場造成很大衝擊。

examples.en: Her speech made a strong impact.
examples.zh: 她的演講造成了強烈的影響。

examples.en: Do not forget the importance of sleep.
examples.zh: 別忘了睡眠的重要性。

examples.en: She stressed the importance of teamwork.
examples.zh: 她強調了團隊合作的重要性。

examples.en: There is a big difference between the two plans.
examples.zh: 這兩個計畫之間有很大的差異。

examples.en: Your help made a real difference.
examples.zh: 你的幫助帶來了真正的改變。

img: two shapes side by side comparison

examples.en: There is a similarity between the two sisters.
examples.zh: 這兩姊妹之間有相似之處。

examples.en: We noticed many similarities in their styles.
examples.zh: 我們注意到他們風格上有許多相似之處。

examples.en: What is the meaning of this word?
examples.zh: 這個字的意思是什麼?

examples.en: He searched for the meaning of life.
examples.zh: 他尋找人生的意義。

examples.en: Do not make an assumption without proof.
examples.zh: 沒有證據前不要妄下假設。

examples.en: His assumption turned out to be wrong.
examples.zh: 他的假設結果是錯的。

examples.en: The trip went beyond my expectation.
examples.zh: 這趟旅行超出了我的預期。

examples.en: Parents often have high expectations.
examples.zh: 父母通常有很高的期望。

examples.en: Every action has a consequence.
examples.zh: 每個行為都有後果。

examples.en: He faced the consequences of his choice.
examples.zh: 他面對自己選擇的後果。

examples.en: Money was a key factor in his decision.
examples.zh: 金錢是他做決定的關鍵因素。

examples.en: Weather is an important factor for farmers.
examples.zh: 天氣是農民的重要因素。

examples.en: Love is an abstract idea.
examples.zh: 愛是一種抽象的概念。

examples.en: He enjoys abstract art.
examples.zh: 他喜歡抽象藝術。

examples.en: It is possible to finish this today.
examples.zh: 今天完成這件事是可能的。

examples.en: We tried every possible way.
examples.zh: 我們試了每一種可能的方法。

examples.en: It is likely to snow tomorrow.
examples.zh: 明天很可能會下雪。

examples.en: She is the most likely winner.
examples.zh: 她是最有可能的獲勝者。

examples.en: The answer was obvious to everyone.
examples.zh: 答案對每個人來說都很明顯。

examples.en: It is obvious that he is tired.
examples.zh: 很明顯他累了。

examples.en: Water is essential for life.
examples.zh: 水是生命所必需的。

examples.en: Good sleep is essential for health.
examples.zh: 良好的睡眠對健康是必要的。

img: core seed at center of fruit

examples.en: This is a typical day for me.
examples.zh: 這是我典型的一天。

examples.en: It was a typical example of his work.
examples.zh: 這是他作品的典型例子。

examples.en: This is just a general idea of the plan.
examples.zh: 這只是計畫的大致概念。

examples.en: The general opinion was positive.
examples.zh: 普遍的意見是正面的。

examples.en: There was a significant change in the plan.
examples.zh: 計畫有了顯著的改變。

examples.en: This is a significant moment in history.
examples.zh: 這是歷史上重要的時刻。

examples.en: This young player has great potential.
examples.zh: 這位年輕球員很有潛力。

examples.en: The plan has the potential to succeed.
examples.zh: 這個計畫有成功的潛力。

examples.en: He has a tendency to arrive late.
examples.zh: 他有遲到的傾向。

examples.en: There is a tendency toward online learning.
examples.zh: 有一種朝向線上學習的趨勢。
